title: How do I create a staff holiday/vacation planner/tracker in Monday?
excerpt: Does anyone know how to create or add a staff holiday planner in Monday?  I found a template but it seems to not be live anymore.

posts.author: GregS (Greg)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone know how to create or add a staff holiday planner in Monday? I found a template but it seems to not be live anymore.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Greg! Charlotte here from the monday team! Would love to help with this!

Here are a few ideas to get you started:

  • This work calendar template
  • This video laying out a holiday resource planning scheme from TeamBoard
  • This vacation request form/board template

Do any of these help you achieve what you’re looking for?

Let us know what you think!
